title: Positive flow - Exercise Entry Form
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Enter '12min' in the duration field. | Enter '184 cals' in the calorie count field. | Enter 'Dec 14' in the date field. | Click on the 'Save' button to save the entry.
expected_result: The entry is saved successfully, and the form is reset for a new entry.

title: Negative flow - Empty fields
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Leave all fields empty. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all fields are required.

title: Negative flow - Invalid date format
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Enter '12min' in the duration field. | Enter '184 cals' in the calorie count field. | Enter 'Invalid date format' in the date field. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the date format is invalid.

title: Negative flow - Negative duration
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Enter '-12min' in the duration field. | Enter '184 cals' in the calorie count field. | Enter 'Dec 14' in the date field. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the duration cannot be negative.

title: Negative flow - Negative calorie count
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Enter '12min' in the duration field. | Enter '-184 cals' in the calorie count field. | Enter 'Dec 14' in the date field. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the calorie count cannot be negative.

title: Negative flow - Negative date
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the Exercise Entry form screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Exercise Entry form screen. | Enter '12min' in the duration field. | Enter '184 cals' in the calorie count field. | Enter '-Dec 14' in the date field. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the date cannot be negative.
